name: Better Stack
routeName: Create your first uptime monitor (free plan)
firstSuccessOutcome: A monitor is live and continuously checking your URL from multiple regions.

steps.action: Open Better Stack Uptime getting-started docs
Sign up for free Better Stack account
Verify email and log in to dashboard
Go to Monitors then Create monitor
Enter the URL or IP to monitor
Choose alerting options like email or SMS
Click Create monitor to start checking
See monitor running and reporting uptime status

name: Checkly
firstSuccessOutcome: A Playwright browser check runs around the clock from global locations in your dashboard.

steps.action: Open the Checkly quickstart docs
Run npx checkly init to scaffold project
Run npx checkly login to sign up
Authorize CLI in the browser login flow
Edit example homepage.spec.ts browser check
Run npx checkly test to dry-run
Run npx checkly deploy to production
Open dashboard and see check monitoring

name: Coralogix
firstSuccessOutcome: Your first logs arrive and are visible in the Coralogix dashboard.

steps.action: Open Coralogix getting-started docs
Sign up for 14-day free trial, no card
Verify email and log in
Get Send-Your-Data API key from Data Flow
Pick a shipper like OpenTelemetry Collector
Send logs to your region endpoint with key
View incoming logs in Coralogix dashboard

name: Dynatrace
firstSuccessOutcome: OneAgent monitors a host and it appears in the Hosts table.

steps.action: Open Dynatrace Get started / try-free page
Start free 15-day trial, no card
Create account, verify email, log in
Go to Install OneAgent, generate API token
Download and install OneAgent on a host
Restart processes so OneAgent instruments them
See host in Infrastructure & Operations Hosts

name: Rollbar
routeName: Free signup, create project, install SDK
firstSuccessOutcome: Your first error is captured and shown in the Rollbar dashboard.

steps.action: Open Rollbar getting-started / setup docs
Sign up free at app.rollbar.com/signup
Verify email and log in
Create a project and copy access token
Install the Rollbar SDK for your language
Initialize SDK with your access token
Trigger or send a test error
See first error in Rollbar dashboard

name: Rootly
routeName: Quick start: sign up, connect Slack, first incident
firstSuccessOutcome: A test incident is created end to end with its Slack channel and timeline.

steps.action: Open Rootly quick start guide
Sign up via Google, Slack, SSO, or email
Set password, accept terms, verify email
Join or create your organization
Connect the Slack integration to your workspace
Click Create Test Incident from dashboard
Incident created with channel and timeline

name: Splunk
routeName: Splunk Cloud Platform 14-day free trial quickstart
firstSuccessOutcome: An uploaded log file is indexed and searchable as time-stamped events.

steps.action: Open Splunk Cloud Platform free trial page
Sign up for 14-day free trial, no card
Verify email; wait for cloud instance provisioning
Log in at your splunkcloud.com URL
Go to Settings then Add Data then Upload
Select a log file and click Submit
Click Start searching to see indexed events

name: Astronomer
routeName: Run your first dag on Astro (in-browser trial onboarding)
firstSuccessOutcome: An example Airflow DAG is deployed and completes its first run on Astro.

steps.action: Open Astro Run your first dag docs
Start free 14-day Astro trial with email
Create password and verify email
Create Organization and Workspace
Select an example template like ETL
Start test deployment and wait for build
Open Airflow and trigger the DAG run
DAG run completes successfully on Astro

name: Fivetran
firstSuccessOutcome: A source connector completes its initial sync, landing data in your destination.

steps.action: Open Fivetran quickstart docs
Sign up at fivetran.com/signup for free trial
Verify email, enter guided setup wizard
Connect a source like Google Sheets, Save & Test
Connect destination or Snowflake trial, Save & Test
Click Start initial sync
Wait for sync; data lands in destination

name: UiPath
routeName: Studio Web free trial, build from a template
firstSuccessOutcome: Your first automation workflow runs successfully in the browser-based Studio Web.

steps.action: Go to studio.uipath.com Studio Web overview
Sign up for free UiPath trial account
Create account, verify email, log in
Open Studio Web and go to Templates
Select a template and click Use template
Run the workflow in the project designer
Workflow runs successfully; publish automation
